title: Christophe Théron
text: Home * People * Christophe Théron Christophe Théron [1] Christophe Théron , a French computer chess programmer living in Guadeloupe . He started chess programming at the age of 17 in 1982 on a TRS-80 1.77 Mhz home computer [2] . Christophe is author of the chess engine Chess Tiger .
